note: Submodule of ai_image_alt_text: a single admin form to bulk-generate alt text for images missing it. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded), probing documented facts; no site mutation.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site I want to fill in missing alt text for many images at once using AI. Which module/submodule provides that and where is its form?
evals.expected_output: The ai_image_bulk_alt_text submodule of AI Image Alt Text; its form is at /admin/config/media/ai_image_bulk_alt_text (Config → Media → Bulk Generate Alt Text with AI).

evals.prompt: What does the ai_image_bulk_alt_text submodule depend on to actually generate alt text?
evals.expected_output: It depends on the parent ai_image_alt_text module (and through it AI Core / drupal/ai); it has no AI code of its own and reuses the parent's AI chat_with_image_vision generation.

evals.prompt: Which permission controls access to the bulk alt-text form in ai_image_bulk_alt_text?
must_contain_any: batch fix ai images alt text
evals.expected_output: The 'batch fix ai images alt text' permission gates the bulk form.

evals.prompt: How does the ai_image_bulk_alt_text form decide which images to show?
evals.expected_output: It scans content entity types/bundles for image fields with alt text enabled (alt_field) and lists field items whose alt value is empty (capped at 50 per load).

evals.prompt: In the bulk alt-text form, are AI suggestions saved automatically, and how do changes get written to the images?
evals.expected_output: No. Suggestions populate editable textareas; only when you press 'Save changes' does it load each entity, set the field's alt value, and save — keeping a human in the loop.

evals.prompt: Does the ai_image_bulk_alt_text submodule have its own settings/config for prompt and model?
evals.expected_output: No — it defines no config, schema, or services. Prompt, image style, and provider/model all come from the parent ai_image_alt_text module's settings.
